name: foreign key helpers
details: projections dedicated to enrich tables with so called helper columns that make an abstract foreign key field more accessible to humans

name: xref to cross table
details: projections dedicated to transforming the relationship between to entities between an xref and a crosstable form

name: cell codec
details: projections dedicated to compact multiple values into one value

name: legend blocks
details: projections dedicated to adding legend blocks to tabular data and / or provide cell validations (cell dropdowns) to spreadsheets

name: multiheader
details: projections dedicated to transform nested entities (common to structured data like xml, json etc.) into a form that is suitable for tabular data (multi line headers or flattened headers)

name: Nested data
details: projections that transform nested data (e.g. list elements in a json) into tabular data and validiations that ensure type conformity

name: typed cells
details: projections that transform between data types (e..g. parsing numbers from string values) and carrier transfomrmation that make content within meta visible as proper data (e.g. error states, user presets for ux etc.)

name: dynamic projections
details: projections that present a subset of rows depending on user maintained data

name: schema maintenance
details: changes to the data structure (columns or rows) and validations of referencial integrity

name: Split table
details: split a table into mulitple tables
